overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game showing a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit spaceship interior. The character walks through a narrow technical corridor past cylindrical server racks with green glowing lights, approaching a doorway leading to a medical bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship server room with cylindrical data storage units

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the technical corridor past server equipment and workbenches

entered.detail: cluttered workstation with monitors and equipment against the left wall
tall cylindrical data storage units with vertical green glowing light strips
array of screens mounted on the far wall displaying technical data
round metal table with scattered items and tools

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial corridor lined with cylindrical server units emitting green light. The environment features metal grate flooring and technical workstations, with the character walking steadily forward past the equipment.

events.description: approaching the doorway revealing the medical bay interior with a bed

agents.ego_description: character approaching the doorway to the medical bay and pausing to look into the adjacent room

entered.detail: rounded doorway frame leading to the adjacent medical bay room
hospital bed visible through the doorway in the next room

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking toward a doorway on the right side, revealing a medical bay with a bed inside. The server equipment and workbench pass out of view as the character approaches the threshold, transitioning from the technical corridor to the medical area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a technical corridor that gradually opens into a sterile medical bay. It begins with the character walking steadily forward along a narrow industrial passage lined with cylindrical server units emitting a green glow. As the character advances over metal grate flooring and past technical workstations, the server equipment and workbenches slowly slide out of view. The scene then shifts toward a doorway on the right, transitioning from the cramped technical environment as the camera approaches the threshold. Finally, the view expands to reveal the interior of a medical bay featuring a patient bed.
